name: Feroxbuster
description: Fast, recursive content discovery tool written in Rust. Finds hidden directories and files.

metadata.ai_description: Feroxbuster is a fast recursive content discovery tool. Unlike gobuster, it automatically recurses into discovered directories. Written in Rust for high performance. Excellent for finding deeply nested files and directories. Use when you need thorough directory enumeration.
use_cases: Recursive directory discovery on web servers
Find deeply nested files and admin panels
limitations: Can be noisy - sends many requests

commands: apt-get install -y -qq feroxbuster || (curl -sL https://github.com/epi052/feroxbuster/releases/latest/download/feroxbuster_amd64.deb.zip -o /tmp/ferox.zip && cd /tmp && unzip -o ferox.zip && dpkg -i feroxbuster_*_amd64.deb)
